history.summary: Built a mock brand kit for Coca-Cola, incorporating user decisions on classic red, vintage cream background, and clean typography. Created a styled, self-contained HTML brand-kit.html page.
Built and registered the 'transcript-to-script' skill based on the SCRAPE framework, including prompt file, manifest, and system-wide documentation updates.
Built and registered the 'hindsight-memory' skill, implementing Retain, Recall, and Reflect operations. Initialized memory/hindsight_memories.json with facts from previous sessions.
